top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nearly 100 US troops injured in 2 weeks since Iran war resumed
top_signals.summary: Pentagon says most soldiers suffered ‘minor concussions’ and have returned to duty
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Burnham can prove he’s pro-business by scrapping stamp duty on shares
top_signals.summary: London’s decline as a financial capital isn’t inevitable. By scrapping stamp duty om shares – a tax that investors in America, China and India simply do not pay – Andy Burnham can turn the City around, says Tom Willerton-Gartside London is being overtaken. Once the undisputed financial capital of the richest country in the world, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Thames Water lenders to offer ‘golden share’ to UK government
top_signals.summary: Creditors plan improved offer in bid to avoid nationalisation by new Burnham government
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan among banks to help finance Japan’s $550 billion U.S. investment plan: sources
top_signals.summary: Japanese banks have been reluctant to participate, as their funding base is in yen, and obtaining U.S. dollars for ​big long-term infrastructure projects can be costly for them.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: An AI SOC Evaluation Guide for Security Leaders
top_signals.summary: Choosing an AI SOC platform requires understanding how it will perform in your own environment, not just during an evaluation. Prophet Security shares a practical framework for assessing AI SOC solutions, including how to validate accuracy, operating models, long-term reliability, and production readiness. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Wärtsilä, Carnival Corporation Sign Lifecycle Agreement to Support Cruise Fleet Performance
top_signals.summary: Wärtsilä and Carnival Corporation, the world’s largest cruise company, have entered into an 8-year Lifecycle Agreement covering four cruise vessels within the Princess Cruises and Carnival Cruise Line fleets, including two newbuild vessels currently under construction.
